notes: ExamPaperInputSchema is a module-private const (only the ExamPaperInput type is exported) — the runner cannot import the Zod schema directly. title is EXCLUDED from script checks: it legitimately contains Latin board acronyms/proper nouns ('CBSE Class 10 ...') even in Bengali/Tamil papers. answerKey/markingScheme are per-question optional and often numeric — excluded. State-board cases (WBBSE, TN SSLC) have no official blueprint in board-blueprints.ts; the flow degrades to a free-form 4-5 section paper by design. PYQ retrieval (Maths/Science Class 9-10) adds latency; generation of a full 80-mark paper is long-running (60s+). userId omitted so no Storage/Firestore persistence.
